channel.title: Lindblad Equation on OkongOyangO's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Lindblad Equation on OkongOyangO's Notes

item.title: 😈Non-Hermitian Hamiltonians, Liouvillian Superoperator Spectra, and Exceptional Points
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (OkongOyangO)
item.description: This note introduces two core concepts in non-Hermitian quantum physics: the Liouvillian superoperator within the Lindblad master equation formalism, and the spectral features of exceptional points (EP) unique to non-Hermitian matrices.
